936 HPNTC_TKNG_CD HPNTC_TKNG_CD N0415D1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Hypnotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking hypnotic medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
